title: Hyderabad、Telangana — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Hyderabad、Telangana的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Hyderabad是Telangana的一個城市，人口約9,480,000。A historic city known for its pearl and diamond trading, now a major IT and pharmaceutical hub with iconic Charminar monument.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
